prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约为2666→3768→4213→5443→6392，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约3726名，年均后移约930名；2025年基准位次约63 92名；该校在甘肃省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年20人、2022年19人、2023年18人、2024年19人、2025年21人，2026年计划扩至27人，较2025年增加6 人（增幅约28.6%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有缓和作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 对外经济贸易大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第57名，属财经类顶尖院校 ，近年排名稳定在50–60名区间；该校2026年抖音综合热度排名第91位，评价为"一般"，较2023年的"较热"有所下降；声誉文件中未见该校明显负面或正面舆情 事件，整体声誉平稳；财经类院校近年整体报考热度呈分化态势；应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，均为A类学科，在财经类院校中实力突出，对相 关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业整体热度近年有所降温，金融/财经类社会舆论呈分化观望态势；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，较202 5年（历史类+物理类约179817人）增长约21.6%，其中物理类按比例估算约147622人，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；该校位于北京市，对甘肃省考生具有较强地 域吸引力；该校在甘肃省招生占比约1.2%–1.3%（2024–2025年），属中等偏低水平，扩招后占比略有提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（年均后移约930名）、2 026年大幅扩招（+28.6%）对竞争的缓和作用、甘肃省考生规模增长（+21.6%）带来的竞争加剧，以及财经类热度分化、学校声誉平稳等因素，扩招效应与考生增长效应基本对冲 ，但历年下行惯性仍占主导；预测2026年最低位次约7518名，区间7018–8018名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融工程（量化金融实验班）
- 法学类（法学，可参与法学-大数据双学士学位项目或涉外型卓越经贸法律人才实验班选拔）
- 金融学类（金融学、金融学（国际金融与市场）、经济与金融、投资学、保险学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工商管理类（会计学、财务管理、人力资源管理、市场营销、工商管理，可参与会计学与北邮计算机/金融科技联合学士学位项目选拔）
- 经济学类（国际经济与贸易、财政学、税收学）
- 金融工程（大类招生）（金融工程、金融科技，可参与金融科技与北邮人工智能联合学士学位项目选拔）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 精算学（可参与精算学-劳动与社会保障双学士学位项目、精算与风险管理实验班选拔）
- 保险学（全部进入大数据双学士学位项目）
- 信息管理与信息系统
- 外国语言文学类（商务英语、翻译、英语）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7018–8018名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业适度冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如7000名以内）可重点冲击金融工程（量化金融实验 班）和法学类等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（8000名左右）应以三档专业保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 2666 → 3768 → 4213 → 5443 → 6392, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3726 places in the past 4 years, averaging about 930 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 6392; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for science (physics category) was 20 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 21 in 2025, and is planned to expand to 27 in 2026, an increase of 6 from 2025 (an increase of about 28.6%), with a significant expansion that will ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of International Business and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of finance and economics institutions, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years; the university's 2026 Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 91st, rated as 'average', down from 'relatively hot' in 2023; no significant negative or positive public opinion events were found in the reputation documents, with overall reputation stable; finance and economics universities have shown a divergent trend in application popularity in recent years; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, all A-class disciplines, with outstanding strength among finance and economics universities, providing sustained appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled in recent years, with social opinion on finance/economics showing a divergent and wait-and-see attitude; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province general college entrance examination is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% from 2025 (history category + physics category about 179,817), with physics category estimated at about 147,622, and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Gansu candidates; the university's enrollment share in Gansu is about 1.2%–1.3% (2024–2025), a moderately low level, with a slight increase after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (average backward shift of about 930 places per year), the easing effect of the significant expansion in 2026 (+28.6%) on competition, the intensified competition from the increase in Gansu candidate numbers (+21.6%), and factors such as divergent popularity in finance and economics and stable university reputation, the expansion effect and candidate growth effect largely offset each other, but the historical downward inertia still dominates; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 7518, with a range of 7018–8018.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Financial Engineering (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class)
- Law Category (Law, eligible for selection into Law-Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program or International Outstanding Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class)
- Finance Category (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Business Administration Category (Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration, eligible for selection into Accounting and BUPT Computer Science/Fintech Joint Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Economics Category (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation)
- Financial Engineering (Category Enrollment) (Financial Engineering, Fintech, eligible for selection into Fintech and BUPT Artificial Intelligence Joint Bachelor's Degree Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Actuarial Science (eligible for selection into Actuarial Science-Labor and Social Security Dual Bachelor's Degree Program, Actuarial and Risk Management Experimental Class)
- Insurance (all entering Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Foreign Languages and Literature Category (Business English, Translation, English)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7018–8018, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and safely fall back on Tier 3 majors; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 7000), focus on impacting top majors such as Financial Engineering (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class) and Law Category; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 8000), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 357 → 402 → 651 → 664 → 750, showing a fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 393 places over the past 4 years, averaging about 98 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 750. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Gansu Province was 16 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 17 in 2025, with the 2026 plan expanding to 27, an increase of 10 from 2025 (an increase of about 58.8%), a significant expansion that greatly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of International Business and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier finance and economics institutions, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years; the university's 2026 Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 91st, rated as 'average', down from 'relatively hot' in 2023; no significant negative or positive public opinion events are found in the reputation documents, with overall reputation stable; the popularity of finance and economics institutions has shown a divergent trend in recent years; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, and Foreign Language and Literature A- are all A-class disciplines, demonstrating strong strength among finance and economics institutions, providing sustained appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled in recent years, with social opinions on finance/economics showing a divergent and wait-and-see attitude; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province general college entrance examination is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% from 2025 (about 179,817 for history + physics categories), with the history category estimated at about 71,078, expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Gansu candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2%–1.3% (2024–2025), a moderately low level, which significantly increases after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings (average backward shift of about 98 places per year), the significant alleviation of competition from the 2026 large-scale expansion (+58.8%), the intensified competition from the growth of history category candidates in Gansu Province (about +21.8%), and factors such as divergent popularity of finance and economics and stable university reputation; the expansion effect is significantly stronger than the candidate growth effect, but the historical backward inertia and divergent popularity of finance and economics have a certain downward pull on rankings; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1000, with a range of 820–1180.

- Law Category (Law, can participate in Law-Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program or selection for Foreign-Related Excellent Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class)
- Economics Category (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation)
